name: Drunkard's Noodles (Gueyteow Pad Ki Mow)
recipeIngredient: 2 small Fresh red or green chilis, finely chopped
1 small Sweet red or green pepper, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wok or frying pan until a light haze appears.
2. Add the garlic and chilis; stir-fry until the garlic is golden brown.
3. Add the noodles and stir.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and continue to stir-fry until the peppers are just beginning to cook but remain al dente.
5. Transfer the dish to a serving plate.
